The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 15% weaker.
+30%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 30% for 5 seconds.
+15%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.
-10%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 10%.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.

When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.

3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.
-2
Secret Weapon
Interrupting the Enervating Motif requires 2 fewer effects of control.
10
Perfect Storm
When stepping between worlds, all incoming damage to heroes is reduced by 10% for 10 seconds.
+5%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 5% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
2
Reverie Given Form
When heroes step into the material world, they receive Harbinger's Barrier for 2 sec.
+20%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 20% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
+15%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.

Heroes receive 5% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
3
At the Speed of Light
The ability that allows heroes to step from one world to another recharges 3 sec faster.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
+2
Charmer's Skill
Requiem takes 2 sec longer to reach full efficiency.

The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 15% weaker.
+15%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.
+30%
Through a Prism
When interrupting any of the Soloists' Motifs, heroes are sped up by 30% for 5 seconds.
+5
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.

+5
Pillar of Confidence
Harbinger's Barrier takes 5 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
-10%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 10%.
-10%
Strength in Perseverance
Interrupting the Deafening Motif of the Thundering Horn requires 10% less healing.

+25%
Power Unleashed
The Hands of the Orchestra take 25% more Magic damage.
+25%
Keepers of Balance
When stepping into the material world, heroes heal 25% of their max HP.
+25%
Total Elimination
The Hands of the Orchestra take 25% more pure damage.
+25%
Mischievous Team
Increases Pet power by 25%.
+25%
Sparkling Mood
Increases Pet Patronage power by 25%.
-15%
The Tireless
The initial healing reduction of Requiem is 15% weaker.
+15%
The Healer's Gift
When heroes step into the material world, they receive 15% more healing for 5 seconds.
+100%
At the Limit
In the material world, heroes receive 100% of basic attack damage back as healing.
-10%
Effective Tactics
The initial damage reduction of Harbinger's Barrier is reduced by 10%.
+2
Charmer's Skill
Requiem takes 2 sec longer to reach full efficiency.
+5%
Unbridled Energy
Heroes receive 5% bonus energy when stepping into the material world.
+20%
Power over Life
When stepping into the material world, heroes receive 20% of the healing blocked by Requiem.
